query:
UPDATE content_packages 
SET 
  cta = CASE id
    WHEN 150001 THEN 'Explore how Pulse Branding can help you navigate the latest industry trends — book a free brand strategy consultation today.'
    WHEN 120003 THEN 'Discover how Pulse Branding can help you build a brand strategy that stands the test of time — schedule your free consultation today.'
    WHEN 120002 THEN 'Share your brand story with the world — book a free consultation with Pulse Branding to start building your emotional brand narrative today.'
    WHEN 120001 THEN 'Unlock the neuroscience of brand loyalty — book a free brand audit with Pulse Branding and discover how to make your brand unforgettable.'
    ELSE cta
  END,
  keyPoints = CASE id
    WHEN 150001 THEN '["Sustainability and purpose-driven branding are no longer optional — they are expected by modern consumers","AI-powered personalization is reshaping how brands connect with audiences at scale","Authenticity and transparency are the new currency of brand trust in 2026","Cross-platform brand consistency drives 23% higher customer retention rates","Brands that invest in community building outperform competitors by 3x in long-term loyalty"]'
    WHEN 120003 THEN '["Brand strategy must evolve with market shifts — static positioning leads to irrelevance","Data-driven brand decisions outperform gut-feel approaches by 40% in measurable ROI","Consistent visual identity across touchpoints increases brand recognition by 80%","Emotional resonance in brand messaging drives 2x higher conversion rates","Strategic brand differentiation is the single most powerful competitive advantage"]'
    WHEN 120002 THEN '["Founder stories humanize brands and create authentic emotional connections with audiences","Vulnerability and transparency in brand storytelling build deeper customer trust","Personal brand narratives differentiate companies in crowded markets more effectively than features","Emotional resonance in branding drives long-term customer loyalty and advocacy","Authentic founder stories generate 3x more organic engagement than product-focused content"]'
    WHEN 120001 THEN '["The human brain processes visual brand elements in 13 milliseconds — first impressions are neurological","Color psychology in branding can increase brand recognition by up to 80%","Consistent brand messaging activates the same neural pathways as personal relationships","Emotional brand associations are stored in long-term memory — making them more durable than rational arguments","Brands that trigger dopamine responses through storytelling create habitual customer behavior"]'
    ELSE keyPoints
  END
WHERE id IN (150001, 120003, 120002, 120001) AND (cta IS NULL OR cta = '');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3X7ymVRNW2gRHR2.root --database AU2Bbcsi9Q6EAtrWDQRvTo --execute

    WHEN 120001 THEN '["The human brain processes visual brand elements in 13 milliseconds — first impressions are neurological","Color psychology in branding can increase brand recognition by up to 80%","Consistent brand messaging activates the same neural pathways as personal relationships","Emotional brand associations are stored in long-term memory — making them more durable than rational arguments","Brands that trigger dopamine responses through storytelling create habitual customer behavior"]'
